series.title: Behind The Blend
series.description: Go inside the minds of cigar makers, reps, ambassadors, and legends. Discover the process, passion, and people behind the cigar brands you love.

episodes.title: Lynn Hawkins Plasencia Cigars
episodes.description: Sean sits down with Lynn Hawkins to discuss Placencia Cigars' history as a grower, their cultivation, and their manufacturing process.
episodes.longDescription: Sean sits down with Lynn Hawkins of Placencia Cigars, one of the most respected names in the industry. Lynn pulls back the curtain on Placencia's extensive history as a leading grower and producer, sharing insights into their meticulous tobacco cultivation, the intricate art of their cigar manufacturing process, and what makes their family's legacy truly stand out in the world of premium cigars.

episodes.title: Willy Marante La Aurora Cigars
episodes.description: Willy Marante of La Aurora Cigars discusses the brand's 122-year Dominican legacy, its iconic product lines, and the community-driven nature of the cigar industry.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Behind the Blend, Sean interviews Willy Marante, the national sales manager and East Coast representative for La Aurora Cigars. Willy discusses La Aurora's history as one of the oldest brands in the Dominican Republic, celebrating 122 years, and highlights key products like the newly redesigned 100 Años and the colorful Preferidos lines. He shares insights into his journey from a career in music to cigar sales, the importance of grassroots marketing for small brands, and how the cigar industry fosters a sense of community that transcends social and professional backgrounds.

episodes.title: Rick Rodriguez West Tampa Tobacco Co
episodes.description: Rick Rodriguez of West Tampa Tobacco explains his "Chef Rick" nickname and introduces new cigars like the "Circle of Life."
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," Sean Mobley interviews Rick Rodriguez, also known as "Chef Rick," from West Tampa Tobacco, who explains his nickname comes from blending tobacco like a chef uses food to create a desired flavor profile. Rick introduces new cigars like the "Circle of Life," a tribute to his mentors, and the "Double Crab," part of a Tampa-inspired trilogy, shaped like a "flying pig". He shares his personal journey into the cigar industry at age 40 and emphasizes that for him, cigars represent "connection" and a "gateway for a new friendship".

episodes.title: Alex Gonzalez & Jared Burrows
episodes.description: Alex Gonzalez and Jared Burrows of BESA Cigars discuss the brand's origins, including the Cuban-born Mark's idea to create an Albanian cigar, and dive into their Media San Andreas and Maduro blends.
episodes.longDescription: Alex Gonzalez and Jared Burrows of BESA Cigars discuss the brand's origins, including the Cuban-born Mark's idea to create an Albanian cigar, and dive into their Media San Andreas and Maduro blends. They cover their approach to packaging, marketing, and the importance of engaging with their audience in a fun, relatable way.

episodes.title: Brian Motola & George Hadweh Cavalier
episodes.description: Brian and George of Cavalier Cigars discuss their roles, the factory's unique gold leaf process, and their new "pig" size cigars.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," Sean Mobley interviews Brian and George from Cavalier Cigars, who discuss their roles within the company, with Brian as a partner in the Honduran factory (FBT) and George as the sales representative for Florida and Puerto Rico. Brian shares his recent full-time move to Honduras, highlighting the country's beauty and the factory's unique practice of hand-applying gold leaf to cigars, a process where empowered employees can reject imperfect products.

episodes.title: Lou Cross Lure Cigars
episodes.description: This episode of Behind The Blend features Lou Cross, owner of Lure Cigars , to discuss the inspiration and blend behind his brand. Cross shares the moving story behind his cigar line, named as a tribute to his late father.
episodes.longDescription: This episode of Behind The Blend features Lou Cross, owner of Lure Cigars , to discuss the inspiration and blend behind his brand. Cross shares the moving story behind his cigar line, named as a tribute to his late father.

episodes.title: Maurice Mears Patriarch
episodes.description: Host Sean Mobley sits down with Maurice Mears to discuss the story, blends, and philosophy behind JM Patriarch Cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with Maurice Mears, the founder of JM Patriarch Cigars. In this episode, Maurice shares the story and inspiration behind his line of cigars, delving into the blends, tobacco selections, and the philosophy that drives the JM Patriarch brand. Get an inside look at the passion and dedication that goes into crafting these distinguished smokes.

episodes.title: Law Ream Zino Cigars
episodes.description: Sean speaks with Law Ream about his journey into cigar criticism and review methodology with Zino Cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Sean lights up a conversation with Law Ream of Zino Cigars. Beyond his celebrated reviews, Law shares his journey into the world of cigar criticism, his unique methodology for dissecting a blend, and what he believes truly makes a cigar worthy of his praise.

episodes.title: Belkys Sanchez Crowned Heads
episodes.description: Belkys Sanchez of Crown Heads discusses her journey in the cigar industry, the brand's history, and what cigars mean to her.
episodes.longDescription: In this "Behind the Blend" episode, Belkys Sanchez, Regional Sales Manager for Crown Heads, shares her journey in the male-dominated cigar industry, covering her territory of Florida, Georgia, and Puerto Rico. She details the history and offerings of Crown Heads and Ozgener Family Cigars, emphasizing their quality and accessible price points, and highlights the Puerto Rican market's preference for larger ring gauges.

episodes.title: Alex Weghorn Davidoff
episodes.description: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Alex Weghorn, the Brand Activation Manager for Davidoff.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Alex Weghorn, the Brand Activation Manager for Davidoff. Weghorn, who is a former space intelligence specialist for the Air Force, discusses his journey into the cigar industry and his role at Davidoff.

episodes.title: Desiree Sylver Drunk Chicken
episodes.description: Sean discusses the mission and premium flavor profiles of the U.S.A. handmade Drunk Chicken Cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Established in 2019, Drunk Chicken Cigars (DC Cigars) are handmade in the U.S.A. to create premium flavor profiles. Every combination of tobacco leaf, including the filler, binder, and wrapper, was chosen to produce an assortment of smooth, rich, and savory cigars with a variety of customers in mind. Join Sean has he dicusses the mission of the DC Cigars family is to produce premium cigars that can be smoked anytime of the day.

episodes.title: Chantel Leavitt Bella Dama
episodes.description: Host Sean Mobley sits down with cigar maker Chantel Leavitt to discuss the art of blending and the inspiration behind her creations.
episodes.longDescription: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with the esteemed cigar maker, Chantel Leavitt, offering unique insights into the meticulous art of blending and the dedication required to craft exceptional cigars. Discover the inspiration behind Bella Dama's signature creations and gain a deeper appreciation for the nuances that define a truly remarkable smoke.

episodes.title: Ryan Bathurst Oliva Cigar Co
episodes.description: Host Sean sits down with Ryan Bathurst to discuss the rich heritage, craftsmanship, and innovation of Oliva Cigars.
episodes.longDescription: This week on Behind the Blend, host Sean sits down with Ryan Bathurst of Oliva Cigars. Dive deep into the story of one of the most respected names in the industry as Ryan shares insights into Oliva's rich heritage, the craftsmanship behind their acclaimed blends, and what goes into maintaining their consistent quality and innovation. Get ready for an illuminating conversation that pulls back the curtain on the world of Oliva.

episodes.title: Dayan Mederos Duyos Humidors
episodes.description: Dayan introduces Duyos Humidors, the first legally imported Cuban-made cigar accessories in 65 years.
episodes.longDescription: Dayan from Duyos Humidors introduces the first Cuban-made cigar accessories legally imported into the U.S. in 65 years, highlighting their handcrafted humidors made from 100% cedar and other fine woods. He shares his personal connection to cigars through his grandfather's farm in Cuba and discusses the company's future plans, including customization options and collaborations.

episodes.title: Steven Bartell Molon Labe
episodes.description: Molon Labe founder Steven Bartell joins "Behind the Blend" to share the story of creating the world's only company to feature intentionally paired cigars, whiskey, and coffee all under one brand.
episodes.longDescription: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with Steven Bartell, the visionary owner and founder of Molon Labe. Discover the story behind the only company in the world that combines rare reserve cigars, whiskey, and coffee all under one roof.

episodes.title: Alex Gonzalez San Pareil
episodes.description: Join us as we welcome Alex Gonzalez, Brand Ambassador for Sans Pareil Cigars, and a host of The Cigar Guys Podcast, as he takes us on a deep dive into the luxury cigar brand and his journey in the industry!
episodes.longDescription: Alex Gonzalez of Sans Pareil Cigars discusses his luxury cigar brand, whose name means "without equal" in French. He highlights their focus on vintage, aged cigars (aged a minimum of seven years) and the unique community within the cigar industry.

episodes.title: Dr Anthony Grant Hannibal Barca & Henry Daceus Cigars
episodes.description: Henry Dacius introduces his flavored cigars while Dr. Anthony Grant discusses his full African tobacco Hannibal Barca line.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Behind the Blend," host Sean Mobley sits down with Henry Dacius and Dr. Anthony Grant, who share insights into their respective cigar brands. Henry Dacius introduces his line of flavored cigars, including Connecticut with vanilla, Maduro with chocolate, and Habano with espresso, alongside a full-bodied Madura, emphasizing variety for consumers and a unique chocolate flavor not commonly found in the market

episodes.title: Kevin King Brown Konscious Cigars
episodes.description: Kevin shares the story and mindful philosophy behind his brand, Konscious Cigars Co., and what makes it unique in Tampa.
episodes.longDescription: Kevin shares the inspiring story behind his brand, delving into the intentionality and philosophy that shape each blend. Discover what makes Konscious Cigars Co. stand out in the vibrant Tampa cigar scene and the mindful approach Kevin brings to the world of premium tobacco.

episodes.title: Jack Heyer Comacho
episodes.description: Jack Heyer, product manager for Camacho, recounts the brand's successful 2013 rebrand and the story behind perfecting the unique, all-Maduro Triple Maduro cigar.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Behind the Blend, Sean sits down with Jack Heyer, the product manager for Camacho cigars, who shares his journey from being a cigar enthusiast to working for his favorite company, Davidoff, under the Camacho brand. Jack discusses the Camacho Triple Maduro cigar, noting its unique all-Maduro blend, which took 84 tries to perfect, and its long-standing popularity as the company's second-best-selling cigar.

episodes.title: Jose Blanco La Garera
episodes.description: Jose Blanco of La Galera Cigars talks about his family's five-generation legacy in tobacco and the company's core philosophy of blending for full flavor over pure strength.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Behind the Blend, Sean speaks with Jose Blanco from La Galera Cigars, a company with five generations of family history in tobacco farming and cigar manufacturing in the Dominican Republic.

episodes.title: Michael Denys Plasencia Cigars
episodes.description: Sean welcomes Michael Denys to delve into the rich history, diverse farms, and meticulous blending process of Plasencia Cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Sean welcomes Michael Denys from the renowned Plasencia Cigars. Join them as they delve into the rich history and innovative spirit of the Plasencia family, exploring their diverse tobacco farms and the meticulous blending process that defines their acclaimed cigars. Get an insider's perspective on what makes Plasencia a true titan in the industry.

episodes.title: Shaun Wilkinson Rebellion
episodes.description: Sean sits down with Shaun Wilkinson to discuss the challenges and inspiration behind his British cigar brand, Rebellion.
episodes.longDescription: Sean crosses the pond to sit down with Shaun Wilkinson, the driving force behind the British cigar brand, Rebellion. Shaun pulls back the curtain on the unique challenges and triumphs of establishing a premium cigar company in the UK, the inspiration behind Rebellion's distinctive blends, and their vision for the future of British cigars. Tune in for an engaging conversation that explores a fascinating corner of the global cigar landscape.

episodes.title: Juan Lopez Gurkha Cigars
episodes.description: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez to discuss Gurkha Cigars, known as a status symbol that embodies pleasure and enjoyment for all.
episodes.longDescription: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez of Gurka Cigars. Gurkha has several brands that cater to every premium cigar smoker, including the very elite. For many, Gurkha cigars are seen as a status symbol and are synonymous with sumptuousness and exclusivity. However, a beautifully handcrafted and aromatic cigar can be enjoyed by anyone and embodies the pleasure and enjoyment of all good things found in life.

episodes.title: Nick Perdomo Perdomo Cigars
episodes.description: Nick Perdomo discusses his family's cigar-making lineage, his career journey, and Perdomo Cigars' meticulous quality control.
episodes.longDescription: This episode of Behind The Blend features Nick Perdomo of Perdomo Cigars, who shares his family's long lineage in cigar making, his journey from air traffic controller to building a vertically integrated cigar empire, and the company's meticulous 18-step quality control process.

series.title: Burn Rate
series.description: Light up with us as we reveal why cigars earn their scores. Join our tobacconists as they break down every detail from craftsmanship and flavor profile to burn performance and smoke assessment.

episodes.title: La Aroma de Cuba Monarch Toro
episodes.description: In their review of the La Aroma de Cuba Monarch Toro, Bryan and Chris praise the cigar's flawless construction and razor-sharp burn, concluding that its consistent flavor profile of red pepper flake and cedar makes it an excellent choice for a daily smoke.
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris review the La Aroma de Cuba Monarch Toro, a 6x52 cigar with a Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper and Nicaraguan filler and binder.

episodes.title: Cremo Grandeur Toro
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris meticulously analyze the blend, construction, and smoking characteristics of the Grandeur Cremo cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris, the discerning palates behind Burn Rate, turn their attention to the Grandeur Cremo cigar. They'll meticulously analyze its blend, construction, and smoking characteristics, offering their experienced insights into this intriguing offering.

episodes.title: Southern Draw Rose Of Sharon Dozen Roses Solomon
episodes.description: Hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Southern Draw Rose of Sharon, praising its craftsmanship and complex, evolving flavor profile.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Burn Rate," hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Southern Draw Rose of Sharon, Dozen Roses, a Casa de Montecristo exclusive in a Salomon vitola. They praise its craftsmanship, noting the oily, thin-veined Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper and consistent burn.

episodes.title: RoMa Craft Neanderthal HS Corona Extra
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris review the Romacraft Neanderthal HS, a full-bodied "flavor bomb" that earns a high score, and provide tips on how to properly retrohale.
episodes.longDescription: On this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Bryan and Chris review the Romacraft Neanderthal HS in a Corona Extra vitola. They analyze the cigar's complex, multi-national blend and its unique flat-head craftsmanship.

episodes.title: Romeo Y Julieta Reserva Real Toro
episodes.description: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Romeo y Julieta Reserva Real Toro cigar. They note the cigar's smoothness and detail their scoring based on flavor, draw, and burn rate.
episodes.longDescription: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Romeo y Julieta Reserva Real Toro cigar. They note the cigar's smoothness and detail their scoring based on flavor, draw, and burn rate.

episodes.title: Liga Privada Year of the Rat Corona Gorda
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris dissect the distinctive blend, construction, and flavor nuances of the unique Drew Estate Year of the Rat cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris, your trusted tobacco experts, tackle the unique Drew Estate Year of the Rat cigar. They'll dissect its distinctive blend, construction, and flavor nuances, offering their seasoned perspectives on this celebrated release. Tune in to see if this Year of the Rat lives up to the hype and earns their stamp of approval.

episodes.title: Island Jim By Oscar
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris review the Island Jim by Oscar Natural. Known for its unique, "funky" appearance, cigar features a Nicaraguan Jalapa wrapper with a Honduran binder and filler
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris review the Island Jim by Oscar Natural. Known for its unique, "funky" appearance, cigar features a Nicaraguan Jalapa wrapper with a Honduran binder and filler

episodes.title: Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edicion Limitada Perfecto
episodes.description: Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edición Limitada Perfecto cigar. They note the cigar's unique Perfecto shape and evaluate its wrapper, construction, and overall smoking experience.
episodes.longDescription: Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Oliva Serie V 135th Anniversary Edición Limitada Perfecto cigar. They note the cigar's unique Perfecto shape and evaluate its wrapper, construction, and overall smoking experience.

episodes.title: Drew Estate Undercrown 10 Toro
episodes.description: Hosts Bryan Baiss and Chris Kelly review the Undercrown 10 by Drew Estate Toro, evaluating its craftsmanship and flavor profile.
episodes.longDescription: On this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Bryan Baiss and Chris Kelly review the Undercrown 10 by Drew Estate Toro, evaluating its craftsmanship and flavor profile which featured dry cherry and black pepper, noting a consistently burning cigar despite its initial dryness.

episodes.title: Cohiba Riviera Robusto Box Pressed
episodes.description: Seasoned authorities Bryan and Chris deliver their expert assessment of the highly anticipated Cohiba Riviera cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Join seasoned tobacco authorities Bryan and Chris as they put the highly anticipated Cohiba Riviera under the microscope. Expect a detailed breakdown of its construction, flavor profile, and overall smoking experience.

episodes.title: Espinosa Knuckle Sandwich Connecticut Short Churchill G
episodes.description: Brian and Chris review the Knuckle Sandwich Short Churchill by Espinosa. The guys analyze the flavor, burn, and smoke of this Ecuadorian Connecticut cigar, discussing whether celebrity-backed brands live up to the hype or fall flat.
episodes.longDescription: Brian and Chris review the Knuckle Sandwich Short Churchill by Espinosa. The guys analyze the flavor, burn, and smoke of this Ecuadorian Connecticut cigar, discussing whether celebrity-backed brands live up to the hype or fall flat.

episodes.title: Placencia El Ano De La Culebra Edicion Limitada 2025 Lancero
episodes.description: Hosts Chris and Bryan rate and discuss the Plascencia El Año De La Culebra Edición Limitada 2025 Lancero cigar. They specifically evaluate this cigar based on its draw, flavor, and overall construction.
episodes.longDescription: Hosts Chris and Brian rate and discuss the Plascencia El Año De La Culebra Edición Limitada 2025 Lancero cigar. They specifically evaluate this cigar based on its draw, flavor, and overall construction.

episodes.title: West Tampa Circle Of Life Robusto
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris review the West Tampa Circle of Life Robusto, a consistent "pepper bomb" that shines in its smoke production and earns an identical score from both reviewers.
episodes.longDescription: Hosts Bryan and Chris tackle the new-for-2025 West Tampa Circle of Life Robusto on this episode of "Burn Rate". They break down the cigar's rustic appearance and solid construction before lighting up what they consistently describe as a "pepper bomb".

episodes.title: Crux Du Connoisseur No.1
episodes.description: Seasoned reviewers Bryan and Chris meticulously examine the blend and construction of the Crux Du Connoisseur cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris, the seasoned cigar reviewers on Burn Rate, meticulously examine the Crux Du Connoisseur. They'll dissect the blend, construction, and overall smoking experience of this highly regarded cigar.

episodes.title: Gurkha Year of the Dragon AJ Fernandez Figurado
episodes.description: Tobacco aficionados Bryan and Chris dissect the blend, construction, and flavor profile of a specific Gurkha cigar offering.
episodes.longDescription: This week on Burn Rate, tobacco aficionados Bryan and Chris delve into the diverse and often debated world of Gurkha cigars. They'll explore a specific Gurkha offering, dissecting its blend, construction, and flavor profile.

episodes.title: Leaf By Oscar Sumatra Toro
episodes.description: Hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Leaf by Oscar Sumatra Robusto, highlighting its unique packaging and evolving flavor profile.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of "Burn Rate," hosts Bryan and Chris Kelly review the Leaf by Oscar Sumatra Robusto, a 5x50 cigar featuring an Ecuadorian Sumatra wrapper, Honduran filler, and Honduran binder.

episodes.title: Aganorsa Rare Leaf Reserve Toro
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris meticulously analyze the unique blend and distinct flavors of the sought-after Aganorsa Rare Leaf Reserve cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Join Bryan and Chris on Burn Rate as they delve into the highly sought-after Aganorsa Rare Leaf Reserve cigar. These seasoned tobacco experts will meticulously analyze the unique blend and construction, offering their insights on the distinct flavors and overall smoking experience.

episodes.title: Crowned Heads Las Calaveres 2024 LC52
episodes.description: This episode of Burn Rate features a review of the Crowned Heads Las Calaveras cigar. Bryan and Chris discuss the cigar's construction , Ecuador Habano wrapper , and flavor notes, which include a dry cherry, graham cracker-like sweetness, and a leathery, earthy core. They each assign their own rating based on the smoking experience.
episodes.longDescription: This episode of Burn Rate features a review of the Crowned Heads Las Calaveras cigar. Bryan and Chris discuss the cigar's construction , Ecuador Habano wrapper , and flavor notes, which include a dry cherry, graham cracker-like sweetness, and a leathery, earthy core.

episodes.title: Davidoff Winston Churchill Limited Edition The Artist Churchill
episodes.description: In this episode of Burn Rate hosts Bryan and Chris review the highly anticipated Davidoff Winston Churchill Limited Edition 2025. This special Churchill-sized cigar celebrates Sir Winston Churchill's passion for painting, featuring a box adorned with artwork he created in his mid-80s.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Burn Rate hosts Bryan and Chris review the highly anticipated Davidoff Winston Churchill Limited Edition 2025. This special Churchill-sized cigar celebrates Sir Winston Churchill's passion for painting, featuring a box adorned with artwork he created in his mid-80s.

episodes.title: Casa Magna Liga F Toro
episodes.description: Chris and Bryan review the Casa Magna Liga cigar, noting its good construction, sweet and creamy flavor profile with notes of cedar and chocolate, and enjoyable burn. They determine its overall rating based on the smoking experience.
episodes.longDescription: Chris and Bryan review the Casa Magna Liga cigar, noting its good construction, sweet and creamy flavor profile with notes of cedar and chocolate, and enjoyable burn. They determine its overall rating based on the smoking experience.

episodes.title: Arturo Fuente Hemingway Signature
episodes.description: Brian and Chris review the Arturo Fuente Hemingway Signature cigar, a 6×47 Figurado featuring a Cameroon wrapper and Dominican binder and filler. They praise its high craftsmanship, consistent blue smoke, and complex flavor profile, which includes notes of graham cracker, spice, and cashew
episodes.longDescription: Brian and Chris review the Arturo Fuente Hemingway Signature cigar, a 6×47 Figurado featuring a Cameroon wrapper and Dominican binder and filler. They praise its high craftsmanship, consistent blue smoke, and complex flavor profile, which includes notes of graham cracker, spice, and cashew

episodes.title: Adrian Magnus Black Toro
episodes.description: In this episode of Burn Rate Bryan and Chris review the Adrian Magnus Black Black Toro from the Dominican Republic. While its exact blend was difficult to verify, the guys suspect it features an oily Maduro wrapper with a Dominican binder and filler.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Burn Rate Bryan and Chris review the Adrian Magnus Black Black Toro from the Dominican Republic. While its exact blend was difficult to verify, the guys suspect it features an oily Maduro wrapper with a Dominican binder and filler.

episodes.title: Padron 1964 Anniversary Series Exclusivo Robusto
episodes.description: Bryan and Chris review the Padrone 1964 Anniversary Series Exclusivo, a 50$ box-pressed Nicaraguan Puro with a Maduro wrapper. The guys provide a detailed breakdown of the cigar's craftsmanship, flavor profile, and burn performance across three stages of the smoke.
episodes.longDescription: Bryan and Chris review the Padrone 1964 Anniversary Series Exclusivo, a 50$ box-pressed Nicaraguan Puro with a Maduro wrapper. The guys provide a detailed breakdown of the cigar's craftsmanship, flavor profile, and burn performance across three stages of the smoke.

episodes.title: Aging Room La Boheme Rafael Nodal
episodes.description: In this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Brian Base and Chris Kelly evaluate the Aging Room La Bohéme Pittore, a Robusto that pays tribute to Giacomo Puccini's famous opera.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Burn Rate, hosts Brian Base and Chris Kelly evaluate the Aging Room La Bohéme Pittore, a Robusto that pays tribute to Giacomo Puccini's famous opera.

series.title: Cigar Essentials
series.description: Hosts Howard and Rachel G review the latest cigar accessories—from humidors to cutters—giving you honest tips to upgrade your gear and perfect your premium smoking experience.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 1
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. unbox and review five cigar accessories. They demonstrate a variety of tools, including a cedar-lined travel case kit , a digital humidometer , a rose-gold torch with an integrated cutter , and a set of protective mouthpieces. The show concludes with a heavy cast-iron monkey ashtray that vents smoke through its nostrils, with the hosts highlighting the unexpected affordability of all the products.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. unbox and review five cigar accessories. They demonstrate a variety of tools, including a cedar-lined travel case kit , a digital humidometer , a rose-gold torch with an integrated cutter , and a set of protective mouthpieces. The show concludes with a heavy cast-iron monkey ashtray that vents smoke through its nostrils, with the hosts highlighting the unexpected affordability of all the products.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 2
episodes.description: In this second episode of Cigar Essentials on Cigar TV, Howard G. and Rachel G. showcase five more cigar accessories, ranging from durable travel gear to luxury gift items. They explore various tools including a weatherproof travel humidor, a high-end dual cutter, and a specialized infusion vessel for flavoring cigars with spirits. The episode highlights the practicality and design of these products, emphasizing their value as personal essentials or professional gifts.
episodes.longDescription: In this second episode of Cigar Essentials on Cigar TV, Howard G. and Rachel G. showcase five more cigar accessories, ranging from durable travel gear to luxury gift items. They explore various tools including a weatherproof travel humidor, a high-end dual cutter, and a specialized infusion vessel for flavoring cigars with spirits. The episode highlights the practicality and design of these products, emphasizing their value as personal essentials or professional gifts.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 3
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase a variety of cigar accessories, including a high-quality acrylic humidor, a cedar-lined leather travel case, and lead-free crystal pairing glasses.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase a variety of cigar accessories, including a high-quality acrylic humidor, a cedar-lined leather travel case, and lead-free crystal pairing glasses.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 4
episodes.description: Hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase several travel and maintenance accessories, including the AWOLT Travel Cigar Case, which features a portable ashtray and humidification component, and the Govee Smart Thermo-Hygrometer for remote monitoring via Bluetooth.
episodes.longDescription: Hosts Howard and Rachel G. showcase several travel and maintenance accessories, including the AWOLT Travel Cigar Case, which features a portable ashtray and humidification component, and the Govee Smart Thermo-Hygrometer for remote monitoring via Bluetooth.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 5
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. explore high-end cigar accessories, highlighting the industrial-style AWOLT travel case with its built-in ashtray and the compact Govee smart hygrometer for precise remote monitoring.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. explore high-end cigar accessories, highlighting the industrial-style AWOLT travel case with its built-in ashtray and the compact Govee smart hygrometer for precise remote monitoring.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 6
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. introduce a versatile range of cigar maintenance and lifestyle accessories, including the industrial-style AWOLT travel case featuring a built-in punch, ashtray, and humidification system.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard and Rachel G. introduce a versatile range of cigar maintenance and lifestyle accessories, including the industrial-style AWOLT travel case featuring a built-in punch, ashtray, and humidification system.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 7
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, Howard and Rachel G. showcase various cigar humidification and travel accessories, including a high-capacity cigar cabinet with internal lighting and a miniature "golf bag" travel humidor. They also demonstrate practical maintenance tools such as cigar scissors for controlled cutting and a waterproof, drop-resistant single-flame torch lighter designed for outdoor use.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, Howard and Rachel G. showcase various cigar humidification and travel accessories, including a high-capacity cigar cabinet with internal lighting and a miniature "golf bag" travel humidor. They also demonstrate practical maintenance tools such as cigar scissors for controlled cutting and a waterproof, drop-resistant single-flame torch lighter designed for outdoor use.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 8
episodes.description: Rachel and Howie G highlight the King's Palace soft travel humidor and the Liten dual-blade guillotine cutter.
episodes.longDescription: Rachel and Howie G highlight the King's Palace soft travel humidor and the Liten dual-blade guillotine cutter. They also demonstrate the utility of a high-powered Ravs professional torch, unbreakable silicone ashtrays from Usamee, and cigar-themed bamboo socks by Meemoy Men.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 9
episodes.description: Howard and Rachel G. showcase a premium collection of accessories from the brand Kline, including a cedar-lined leather travel case and a glass-top desktop humidor capable of holding 50 cigars
episodes.longDescription: Howard and Rachel G. showcase a premium collection of accessories from the brand Kline, including a cedar-lined leather travel case and a glass-top desktop humidor capable of holding 50 cigars

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 10
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. showcase a range of practical products including the cedar-lined Scorch Humidor and a powerful 2,400°F jet flame torch. They demonstrate advanced maintenance tools like the Hydra LG cabinet humidifier and Perfect Repair Glue for fixing damaged wrappers, while highlighting the portability of EWT adjustable tubes. The episode provides hands-on reviews of each item’s durability, features, and price points to help viewers enhance their cigar experience.
episodes.longDescription: Howard G. and Rachel G. review cigar gear, including the Scorch Humidor, a high-heat jet torch, and the Hydra LG cabinet humidifier. They also demonstrate the Perfect Repair Glue for fixing wrappers and EWT adjustable tubes for waterproof cigar protection.

episodes.title: Cigar Essentials Episode 11
episodes.description: In this episode of Cigar Essentials, hosts Howard G. and Rachel G. test five lifestyle products for cigar enthusiasts. They review odor-eliminating candles, colognes, and room sprays, along with breath-freshening mints and palate-cleansing chocolate cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Howard G. and Rachel G. unbox and test five lifestyle products designed for cigar enthusiasts. The duo reviews Ardenula soy candles , Cuba Original colognes , The Stink Solution spray , and Breath Death mint crystals to help eliminate lingering smoke odors and freshen breath. To finish the show, they sample Madelaine Swiss milk chocolate cigars, recommending them as a sweet way to cleanse the palate between smokes.

series.title: Cigar TV Original Documentaries
series.description: Experience cinematic stories that go beyond the smoke, capturing the events, history, and moments that continue to shape cigar culture today.

episodes.title: Cigar TV at Tampa Cigar Week 2025
episodes.description: Tampa Cigar Week 2025 offers an immersive experience for cigar enthusiasts, featuring VIP tastings and pairings with premium cigars and spirits, along with various events aimed at celebrating and educating attendees on Tampa's rich cigar culture.
episodes.longDescription: Tampa Cigar Week 2025 offers an immersive experience celebrating the area's rich cigar culture with VIP tastings and events.

episodes.title: Women of the PCA
episodes.description: A new documentary, "Women of the PCA," highlights the growing influence of women in the premium cigar industry, featuring interviews with key figures and footage from events in Tampa, Florida.
episodes.longDescription: A new documentary, "Women of the PCA," highlights the growing influence of women in the premium cigar industry.

episodes.title: Chateau De La Fuente
episodes.description: This documentary episode focuses on the Arturo Fuente cigar family and their legacy, particularly the creation of the Chateau de la Fuente and the highly sought-after OpusX cigar.
episodes.longDescription: Documentary on the Arturo Fuente family's journey to the Dominican Republic to create the Chateau de la Fuente and the iconic OpusX cigar.

episodes.title: Women of the PCA - Fight on Captitol Hill
episodes.description: The Women of the PCA gather in Washington, D.C for meetings on Capitol Hill to discuss issues impacting their industry, such as regulations, taxes, and the artisan nature of premium cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Women of the PCA met on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., to advocate on behalf of the cigar industry. They discussed issues like regulations, taxes, and the artisan nature of premium cigars with lawmakers.

episodes.title: The Hidden Gem of Costa Rica
episodes.description: This documentary episode explores Tabacos of Costa Rica, a multi-generational family business dedicated to the craft of premium cigars. The narrative follows the Leon family and their partners as they showcase the intricate "seed to shelf" process, emphasizing quality, tradition, and the deep communal bonds formed through cigar culture.
episodes.longDescription: This documentary explores the Leon family's multi-generational business, Tabacos of Costa Rica, showcasing their artisanal "seed to shelf" cigar-making process and the communal culture surrounding it.

episodes.title: Episode 1
episodes.description: The premiere introduces the staff at Tampa's Grand Cathedral cigar lounge as they match premium cigars to various customer palates and celebrations. Amidst a friendly push-up bet tied to sales goals, the crew tours the lounge to highlight its rich history and an emotional memorial wall dedicated to fallen first responders.
episodes.longDescription: Welcome to Lounge Life! Today we introduce the crew at Tampa's Grand Cathedral cigar lounge as they guide customers through premium selections tailored to unique palates and celebrations. Between showcasing top brands, the staff engages in a friendly push-up bet tied to their daily sales goals. The episode concludes with a tour of the lounge's custom decor and deep history, highlighting an emotional wall dedicated to honoring fallen first responders.

episodes.title: Episode 2
episodes.description: The staff scrambles to host a 200-guest celebration featuring cigar icon Carlito Fuente Jr.. While preparing the historic venue, Dom guides specialized customers through top-tier selections, including a rare $200 blend. The successful night highlights the crew's bond and the lounge's rich community culture.
episodes.longDescription: The staff scrambles to host a 200-guest "Fuente Friday" celebration featuring cigar icon Carlito Fuente Jr. While preparing the historic venue , Dom guides specialized customers through top-tier selections, including a unique $200 aged blend. The event ends beautifully, celebrating the crew's hard work and the venue's rich community culture.

episodes.title: Episode 3
episodes.description: Dom guides humidor customers through premium selections, matching a cognac-aged blend to a new father and a complex smoke to an oak-aged tequila . Meanwhile, Eric Padrone’s dreams of inheriting a massive cigar fortune are comically crushed when his estate notification turns out to be an online scam .
episodes.longDescription: Dom guides humidor customers through premium cigar pairings, matching top-tier selections like a cognac-aged blend to a new father and a complex smoke to an oak-aged tequila. Meanwhile, Eric Padrone’s sudden dreams of inheriting a massive cigar fortune are comically crushed when his official estate notification turns out to be an online scam.

episodes.title: Episode 4
episodes.description: In this episode of Lounge Life, the Grand Cathedral staff rushes to prepare for an upcoming members' night dinner amidst unexpected equipment failures. Meanwhile, resident expert Dom curates premium cigars for three unique customers: an industry veteran seeking a new flavor , two podcasters needing a rare bourbon pairing , and an entrepreneur celebrating his mother's 90th birthday.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Lounge Life, the Grand Cathedral staff scrambles to prep for an upcoming members' night dinner and whiskey tasting after a weekend power outage damages their equipment. Meanwhile, resident cigar expert Dom curates the perfect smokes for three distinct sets of customers. He expertly guides a 15-year industry veteran to a rare Atabey , matches two podcasters with an exclusive Julius Caesar to pair with a prized bourbon , and helps a local entrepreneur celebrate his mother's 90th birthday with a luxurious Opus Society cigar.

episodes.title: Ol Times Cigars
episodes.description: Go behind the counter at Old Times Cigars in Casselberry, Florida, with father-son owners Alan and Jonathan. Alan shares the story of how he transitioned from real estate to the cigar business in 1988, starting with a tiny shop in downtown Orlando's Church Street Station.
episodes.longDescription: "Unrolled" visits Old Times Cigars in Casselberry, Florida, to hear from father-son owners Alan and Jonathan about their journey since 1988 and the "neighborhood shop" philosophy that guides their vast cigar selection.

episodes.title: Quality Importers Trading Company
episodes.description: This episode explores Quality Importers, a comprehensive provider of cigar accessories, showcasing their diverse product lines, in-house customization services, and new "Conspiracy" cigar brand, all built on a foundation of strategic acquisitions and a passion for the cigar lifestyle.
episodes.longDescription: This episode explores Quality Importers, a comprehensive provider of cigar accessories and their new "Conspiracy" cigar brand.

episodes.title: Vicente Of London
episodes.description: Vito Vicente of London in Naples, Florida, is a cigar lounge offering a wide selection of premium cigars, personalized locker service, and a welcoming atmosphere with ample seating, both indoors and by a scenic pond.
episodes.longDescription: Vito Vicente of London in Naples is a welcoming cigar lounge offering a wide selection of premium cigars.

episodes.title: Miura Cigars
episodes.description: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique cigar lounge and distribution center, specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars, while offering a wide selection of premium brands and actively engaging with the local community.
episodes.longDescription: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique lounge and distribution center specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars.

episodes.title: Isabela's Fine Imported Cigars
episodes.description: Isabela's Bar Cuba in St. Augustine is a unique cigar lounge and bar offering a curated selection of rare and premium cigars within a comfortable, home-like atmosphere, all while celebrating Cuban heritage and fostering strong community connections.
episodes.longDescription: Isabela's Bar Cuba in St. Augustine offers a curated selection of rare cigars in a comfortable, home-like atmosphere.

episodes.title: Gurkha Cigars
episodes.description: This episode explores Gurkha cigars' collaborative "Year of the Dragon 2024" series, featuring partnerships with master blenders and showcasing the brand's innovative packaging, promotional strategies, and dedication to the broader cigar community.
episodes.longDescription: This episode explores Gurkha cigars' collaborative "Year of the Dragon 2024" series and its innovative strategies.

episodes.title: Jc Newman Handrolling Class
episodes.description: In this special edition of Unrolled. Brain and Sean go head to head at handrolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.
episodes.longDescription: In this special edition of Unrolled, Brian and Sean go head-to-head at hand-rolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.

episodes.title: Smoke on the Water Miami
episodes.description: Host Sean Mobley visits Smoke on the Water in Weston, Florida, to explore the lounge's waterfront atmosphere and extensive humidor. General Manager Larry and cigar expert Joaquin discuss premium brands like Padron and Placencia, the venue's spirit collection, and the communal nature of cigar culture.
episodes.longDescription: Host Sean Mobley visits Smoke on the Water in Weston, Florida, to explore their premium humidor and spirits collection with experts Larry and Joaquin.

episodes.title: Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge
episodes.description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean Mobley visits Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge in Fort Myers, Florida, where owners Joey and Jessica showcase their establishment, boasting 28 beer taps, 75 types of bottled and canned beers, and a full wine selection, emphasizing their commitment to diverse pairings for cigars.
episodes.longDescription: Sean Mobley visits Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge, which boasts diverse pairings and a new in-house brand, "Bizarre Cigars."

episodes.title: King Corona Cigars Bar & Cafe
episodes.description: Join Sean Mobley and Kyle Lenz as they tour King Corona Cigars, Bar and Coffee in Ybor City, Florida.. Check out the latest in cigars and learn what sets the lounge apart from the rest.
episodes.longDescription: Sean Mobley and Kyle Lenz tour King Corona Cigars, Bar and Coffee in Ybor City, Florida.

episodes.title: Captains Cigar Lounge
episodes.description: Sean visits Captain's Cigar Lounge in downtown Clearwater, Florida, and speaks with General Manager Glenn. Glenn, who moved to Tallahassee for college before settling in Clearwater, discusses the lounge's recent expansion into offering a full liquor bar, focusing on pairings like whiskey, scotch, bourbon, and rye.
episodes.longDescription: At Captain's Cigar Lounge in Clearwater, General Manager Glenn discusses the lounge's expansion into a full liquor bar, its tiered membership benefits, and his method of using drink preferences to guide customers to the perfect cigar pairing.

episodes.title: Black Leaf Cigar & Wine Lounge
episodes.description: Black Leaf Cigar and Wine Lounge in downtown St. Pete offers a unique and welcoming experience with its self-service wine system, curated cigar selection including house blends made with Davidoff tobacco, and a strong emphasis on community and quality for all patrons.
episodes.longDescription: Black Leaf Cigar and Wine Lounge in St. Pete offers a unique experience with its self-service wine system and curated cigars.

episodes.title: Stogies Cigars
episodes.description: Stogie Smoke Shop in St. Augustine offers a welcoming, home-like atmosphere with a wide selection of cigars, including popular brands and unique hand-rolled house blends, along with pipe tobacco, catering to both local regulars and tourists.
episodes.longDescription: Stogie Smoke Shop in St. Augustine offers a welcoming atmosphere with a wide selection of cigars and house blends.

episodes.title: Leaf & Bean By Isl& Jim
episodes.description: In this episode of "Unrolled," Sean Mobley visits Leaf and Bean by Island Jim in St. Augustine, Florida, interviewing co-owner Jerry Hauman about the lounge's serendipitous opening in a former Italian restaurant. Jerry discusses the unique Island Jim cigar line, including the "number two pencil" Corojo, San Andres, and Connecticut blends.
episodes.longDescription: Sean Mobley visits Leaf and Bean by Island Jim to discuss the lounge's unique cigar line and industry trends.

episodes.title: Rocky Patel Headquarters
episodes.description: In this episode, Sean visits Rocky Patel Headquarters in Naples, Florida, speaking with Purchasing Manager Sean Bustler about the company's growth, extensive award collection, and the intricate process of cigar production and distribution, including managing a 41,000 square foot facility housing 12 million cigars.
episodes.longDescription: This episode visits Rocky Patel Headquarters to highlight the company's growth, production process, and luxurious "Burn" lounges.

episodes.title: Central Cigars & Ruby's Elixir
episodes.description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean explores Central Cigars, a cornerstone of St. Petersburg's cigar scene, highlighting its rich history, expertly curated cigar selection, and the passionate community it fosters.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean explores Central Cigars, a cornerstone of St. Petersburg’s cigar scene.

episodes.title: Privada Cigar Club
episodes.description: Host Sean is joined by guest Brian Desind of Privada Cigar Club in Orlando, Florida. They discuss the value of community and fellowship within the cigar hobby and showcase the atmosphere of a Privada Cigar Club membership.
episodes.longDescription: Host Sean is joined by guest Brian Desind of Privada Cigar Club in Orlando, Florida. They discuss the value of community and fellowship within the cigar hobby and showcase the atmosphere of a Privada Cigar Club membership.

episodes.title: Admiral Cigar Club
episodes.description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean visits Admiral Cigar Lounge in Orlando, Florida, and speaks with owner Miguel, who is a Marine veteran and UCF alumnus. Miguel shares that the lounge, which opened in 2016, is located in an area that was formerly a Naval Training Center and that the name "Admiral" is a tribute to that naval tradition and the military history of the area.
episodes.longDescription: Admiral Cigar Lounge owner and Marine veteran Miguel explains how his Orlando lounge's name honors the area's naval history while fostering a welcoming community for all walks of life with a full bar and premium cigars.

episodes.title: Blend & Barrel
episodes.description: Blend and Barrel offers a variety of products including cigars, spirits, and beers. The lounge's bar is a "gorgeous" and "well-stocked" social space. The hosts and owners discuss how the business is focused on providing a welcoming environment for people to connect, which is something that separates them from other businesses.
episodes.longDescription: Blend and Barrel offers a variety of products including cigars, spirits, and beers. The lounge's bar is a "gorgeous" and "well-stocked" social space. The hosts and owners discuss how the business is focused on providing a welcoming environment for people to connect, which is something that separates them from other businesses.

episodes.title: Old Fashion Cigars Lounge
episodes.description: Old Fashioned Cigars in St. Cloud, Florida is all about the customer's experience, not just selling products. They offer a wide variety of hand-made and premium cigars, including brands like  Arturo Fuente and Romeo y Julieta.
episodes.longDescription: Old Fashioned Cigars in St. Cloud, Florida is all about the customer's experience, not just selling products. They offer a wide variety of hand-made and premium cigars, including brands like  Arturo Fuente and Romeo y Julieta.

episodes.title: Casa De Montecristo Boca Raton
episodes.description: Casa de Montecristo in Boca Raton is a luxurious cigar lounge offering an extensive selection of premium cigars and high-end accessories, a vibrant community atmosphere with unique member benefits and frequent events, and a strong commitment to charitable initiatives.
episodes.longDescription: Casa de Montecristo in Boca Raton is a luxurious cigar lounge offering an extensive selection and vibrant community.

episodes.title: El Titan De Bronze Cigar MFG
episodes.description: This episode of Unrolled Sean visits Titan de Bronze in Little Havana, Miami, to explore their cigar factory and production process. Owner Sandy Cobas and Sean discuss the unique challenges and traditions of cigar making in Miami. Sandy shares their family's history and the philosophy behind their highly regarded cigars.
episodes.longDescription: This episode of Unrolled Sean visits Titan de Bronze in Little Havana, Miami, to explore their cigar factory and production process. Owner Sandy Cobas and Sean discuss the unique challenges and traditions of cigar making in Miami. Sandy shares their family's history and the philosophy behind their highly regarded cigars.

episodes.title: Marcus Daniel Cigar Merchant
episodes.description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean visits Marcus Daniel Tobacconist in downtown Naples to explore their unique cigar offerings. Marcus Daniel, the President and Founder of Marcus Daniel Incorporated, discusses the company's various cigar collections, including the Miami collection's Habano and special Maduro blends.
episodes.longDescription: In this episode, Marcus Daniel discusses his company's various cigar collections and the passion behind them.

episodes.title: Caribbean Cigars
episodes.description: Caribbean Cigars in Miami distinguishes itself by specializing in boutique cigar brands, offering a diverse selection from smaller, innovative manufacturers alongside popular names, and providing personalized customer service to educate and guide new smokers.
episodes.longDescription: Caribbean Cigars in Miami distinguishes itself by specializing in boutique cigar brands and personalized customer service.
